column1: Next Steps: what is the experience of students from a care background in education?
Group variables: Year, Care category, Provider tariff group
Statistics: Main scheme applications, Accepted applicants, Proportion of main scheme applications, Proportion of accepted applicants
Coverage: UK 18 year old applicants who applied by 28 days after JCQ results day
Counts are rounded to the nearest 10, percentages are rounded to 1 decimal place. Percentages where either contributing group is less than 20 are suppressed.
